_note: This bundle is HINGLISH — Hindi vocabulary in Roman script. The bundle key is 'hi' for compatibility with browser locale matching, but the actual content is intentionally not Devanagari. Most of the audience reads/writes Hindi in Roman script on phones; Devanagari is a register switch they don't use casually.
compose.placeholder: Kya hua, kahan, kab — saaf saaf likhiye. Photo hai to neeche ke button se attach kar dijiye.
compose.privacy_note: Kam sateekta = zyada privacy. Sensitive report ke liye 5 ya kam chuniye.
compose.error.no_tag: kam se kam ek tag chuniye
compose.error.invalid_relay_url: relay URL ws:// ya wss:// se shuru hona chahiye
toast.published_0: koi relay available nahi — abhi locally rakha hai, baad mein bhejenge
feed.empty: abhi koi report nahi. pehle aap kijiye.
feed.share_title: is report ka link copy kariye
share.title: Cockroach civic report
share.text: Cockroach network par signed civic report.
share.no_relay: share ke liye koi relay nahi mil raha
share.tell_friend_blurb: Yeh website kisi ko bhi bhej dijiye. Sign-up nahi karna padega — link kholiye aur aap network mein hain. Koi account, email, OTP nahi. Bas kholiye aur likhiye.
share.tell_friend_how: Sharing kaise kaam karta hai: har report ka apna permalink hota hai (har card par ↗ share button hai). Poori network ka ek address hai — thecockroachnetwork.com. Dono mein se kuch bhi, kisi ko bhi bhejiye, woh seedha network mein aa jaayega.
share.tell_friend_copied: Link copy ho gaya — kahin bhi paste kariye
share.tell_friend_text: main bhi cockroach. signed civic reports — koi account nahi, OTP nahi, mita nahi sakte.
identity.identity_blurb: Aapki ed25519 public key. Yahi aapka account hai. Koi email nahi, koi signup nahi, koi recovery nahi — agar yeh device kho gaya aur key export nahi ki, to pehchaan hamesha ke liye gayi.
identity.regen_confirm: Nayi key banaiye? Aapki abhi waali pehchaan aur reputation hat jaayegi.
identity.relays_blurb: Yeh client ek saath kayi relay se baat karta hai. Report sabhi connected relay tak jaati hai. Koi bhi relay chala sakta hai — guide dekhiye.
identity.reset_confirm: Is client ke saath aaye default relay list par wapas jaaiye?
identity.no_relays_hint: Koi relay nahi. Neeche add kariye.
identity.about_blurb: Yeh Cockroach Relay Protocol ka reference client hai. ~700 line plain JavaScript. Padhiye, fork kijiye, apni copy host kijiye, ya poori tarah replace kar dijiye.
identity.privacy_blurb: Aapki secret key is browser se bahar nahi jaati. Jis relay se aap baat kar rahe hain woh aapka IP dekhta hai — sensitive report ke liye Tor ya VPN istemal kariye. Geohash sateekta 7 aapki location ~150 m tak batata hai; sensitive contexts mein 5 ya kam chuniye.
